meta.dataset_name: Eric Bellinger featured appearances cover-art manifest
meta.truthfulness_note: This is a resolver-ready manifest, not a fully populated cover-art CDN list. The previous featured-appearances file lacked release MBIDs/platform album IDs needed to verify exact cover assets in bulk. Entries are therefore marked needs_api_verification unless a specific cover page was manually verified.
recommended_resolution_order: 1. Match by ISRC using iTunes Search/Apple Music lookup when ISRC is available.
2. Match by MusicBrainz recording -> release -> Cover Art Archive when MusicBrainz has cover art.
3. Match Spotify album via oEmbed/API if exact Spotify album URL is discovered.
4. Fall back to Apple Music search result artwork, but only after title/artist/release match.

artwork_size_guidance.apple_music: Use artworkUrl100 from iTunes Search/Lookup, then replace 100x100bb with 3000x3000bb or 1200x1200bb after verifying the URL resolves.
artwork_size_guidance.cover_art_archive: Prefer front-1200 or original for high-resolution; use 500px for UI thumbnails.
artwork_size_guidance.spotify: Use album.images from Spotify Web API or oEmbed thumbnail_url when exact album URL is known.

entries.title: #YAK (You Already Know)
entries.artist_credit: Da Brat feat. Sage the Gemini & Eric Bellinger

verified_cover_page_urls.verification_note: Apple Music page verified as the album/single page and displays the cover image, but the exact Apple CDN artwork URL was not exposed in the browsed page text.
Spotify album URL is listed on the MusicBrainz release page. Exact Spotify image asset requires Spotify oEmbed/API lookup.
MusicBrainz release page says Cover art (0) / No images available.

resolver_inputs.itunes_search_term: #YAK (You Already Know) Da Brat feat. Sage the Gemini & Eric Bellinger
resolver_inputs.musicbrainz_recording_query: recording:"#YAK (You Already Know)" AND artist:"Da Brat"

entries.notes: Verified pages found, but MusicBrainz has no Cover Art Archive image for this release. Use Apple/Spotify API to retrieve exact CDN artwork.
